previous_findings_status: WARN layering (enums.dart in data) — NOT FIXED: domain/** still imports lib/data/models/enums.dart in 12 files

WARN sealed-hierarchy (HardwareTrigger undocumented) — NOT FIXED: trigger.dart still has 4 sealed hierarchies (Trigger, HardwareTrigger, DistressTrigger, DisarmTrigger), architecture-sketch.md §4.4 still lists 2

WARN services (EventServices missing location/hardwareButton/incomingCall) — NOT FIXED: EventServices still exposes audio/messaging/phone/notification/vibration/context/isCancelled/deviceState?/registerSmsWorkId? only
NOTE layering (no fake providers in service_providers.dart) — NOT FIXED: still only Provider<xServiceProtocol> real + simulation pairs (no documentation clarifying the contract)

NOTE alignment (directory tree deviates from §3) — NOT FIXED: lib/data/db/ nesting unchanged; lib/core/errors/, lib/router/redirect_logic.dart, lib/data/migrations/ still absent; lib/core/logging/, lib/core/telemetry/ still present
NOTE exhaustiveness (Random() fallback) — NOT FIXED: session_engine.dart:61 still has `_random = random ?? Random()` default
NOTE wiring (WAL 15 phases vs task-prompt 17) — NOT FIXED: still phase-01…phase-15 only
NOTE alignment (31 routes vs spec 29) — NOT FIXED: app_router.dart still declares 31 GoRoutes

findings.issue: Domain layer still imports enums.dart from data layer across 12 files. This Warn from the previous verification pass is unresolved — creates a reverse Domain→Data dependency that will bite future refactors.
findings.evidence: import 'package:guardianangela/data/models/enums.dart'; — same import appears in chain_event.dart:9, chain_step.dart:9, emergency_contact.dart:5, event_defaults.dart:7, reminder_template.dart:9, session_log.dart:9, session_mode.dart:6, step_config.dart:10, walk_session.dart:8, engine/session_engine.dart:19, orchestration/event_strategy_registry.dart:9, orchestration/strategies/phone_call_contact_strategy.dart:31
findings.suggested_fix: Move lib/data/models/enums.dart to lib/domain/models/enums.dart. File has zero Flutter/Drift/Hive deps; purely a mechanical move plus 12 import rewrites. Leave a re-export shim at the old path if any non-domain code still imports it.

findings.issue: EventServices bundle still missing location, hardwareButton, incomingCall, geofence, batteryMonitor fields that architecture-sketch.md §4.3 lists. Unchanged from prior verification pass.
findings.evidence: final class EventServices declares only audio, messaging, phone, notification, vibration, context, isCancelled, deviceState?, registerSmsWorkId? — none of location/hardwareButton/incomingCall/geofence/batteryMonitor mentioned.
findings.suggested_fix: Either (a) extend EventServices with the missing service protocols OR (b) patch architecture-sketch.md §4.3 to declare those services live on TriggerManager + SessionController, not inside EventServices. Pick one — the current state is ambiguous.

findings.issue: HardwareTrigger sealed hierarchy still orthogonal to architecture-sketch.md §4.4 inventory. Unchanged from prior pass.
findings.evidence: sealed class HardwareTrigger with RepeatPressTrigger, LongPressTrigger subclasses alongside Trigger/DistressTrigger/DisarmTrigger (total 4 sealed hierarchies in trigger.dart).
findings.suggested_fix: Update architecture-sketch.md §4.4 model inventory to list HardwareTrigger (sealed, 2 subtypes) OR fold its fields into HardwareButtonDistressTrigger.

findings.issue: SessionEngine constructor still defaults `random` parameter to `Random()` if not injected. Unchanged from prior pass. Violates §2.3 forbidden-pattern strictly but is a harmless convenience default.
findings.suggested_fix: Make `random` required and update SessionController + tests to pass one explicitly; OR relax §2.3 to allow constructor defaults when the param is overridable.

findings.issue: Directory tree still deviates from architecture-sketch.md §3. lib/core/errors/, lib/router/redirect_logic.dart, lib/data/migrations/ still absent. lib/core/logging/, lib/core/telemetry/ still present as unlisted extras. Unchanged from prior pass.
findings.evidence: find lib/ -maxdepth 3 -type d confirms structure unchanged since last verification.
findings.suggested_fix: Either reflow impl to match spec §3 or patch §3 to list lib/core/logging/, lib/core/telemetry/, lib/data/db/ nesting as deliberate.

findings.issue: WAL still has phase-01 … phase-15 (15 JSON files). Task prompt references 'phases 0-16' (17). Unchanged from prior pass.
findings.suggested_fix: Either add phase-00.json + phase-16.json WAL stubs or update task-prompt numbering to 1-15.

findings.issue: Route count unchanged: 31 GoRoutes vs architecture-sketch.md §8 target of 29. Unchanged from prior pass.
findings.suggested_fix: Either remove distressChains + distressChainEditor extras or update §8 to list them.

findings.issue: service_providers.dart still lacks fake-backed provider wiring AND lacks a header doc-comment explaining why (the prior-pass suggestion was to document the override-via-test contract). Neither a new issue nor a regression, just unresolved.
findings.evidence: File header comment mentions only real + simulation providers; does not mention fakes or override-by-test pattern.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a paragraph to the library doc-comment: 'Fakes are not wired here — tests override providers via ProviderScope(overrides: [audioServiceProvider.overrideWithValue(FakeAudioService())]).' This codifies the contract.

positive_checks: lib/domain/** has ZERO package:flutter/*, package:drift, package:hive*, or package:flutter_riverpod imports — core pure-Dart invariant holds.

lib/services/simulation/** has ZERO imports of url_launcher, flutter/services, geolocator, just_audio, battery_plus, flutter_local_notifications, home_widget, workmanager, permission_handler, share_plus, wakelock_plus, vibration, audio_session, flutter_tts, speech_to_text — 4-layer sim defense structurally intact.
EventStrategyRegistry.forStep is a switch expression with NO default: arm (compile-time exhaustive over ChainStepType).
lib/domain has ZERO 'default:' arms on any enum switch — exhaustiveness preserved (only docstring mention found in event_strategy_registry.dart:5).
lib/domain has ZERO DateTime.now() calls (injected clock used everywhere per D-ENGINE-1).

Sealed-hierarchy pattern used correctly for EngineState, StepConfig (9 concrete final subclasses), Trigger (+ HardwareTrigger, DistressTrigger, DisarmTrigger), ActionDeliveryStatus (4 final _*Status subclasses), SessionPhase.
All 9 StepConfig subclasses are declared `final class` (compile-time hermetic).
Every one of the 15 services has a protocol + real impl + fake impl + simulation impl file (15/15/15/15).
Every one of the 13 features has a Riverpod *ControllerProvider binding.
All 8 Drift tables have matching DAOs (8) and repositories (8).
Wiring map docs/wiring-map.md has 28 rows (≥ 20 threshold).
ChainEvent enum now has 13 values — reminderFired, pauseExpired, stepExecutionFailed all present. reminderFired is emitted at session_engine.dart:536.
Engine methods checkIn / earlyCheckIn / setSpeedMultiplier / restartCurrentStep all present (session_engine.dart:404/421/431/453).

PlatformInfo abstraction lives in lib/core/platform/platform_info.dart with const factory + FakePlatformInfo; 6 service implementations consume it (notification, messaging, phone, stealth_icon, system_ui, device_state).
Only one direct Platform.is* call remains outside lib/core/platform/: lib/data/db/app_database.dart:80 (data-layer DB init, appropriate).

StealthConfig wiring: session_screen.dart:107 (sessionScreenStealth), home_screen.dart:43 (fakeName), notification_service.dart (fakeName + notificationDisguise) — prior Block specs.json #3 is structurally resolved.
SmsContactStrategy now filters contacts by config.channel (single-channel dispatch Extra-15/15b) at sms_contact_strategy.dart:56-67 — prior Block specs.json #2 resolved.
FakeCallConfig.declineIsSafe default is TRUE (step_config.dart:558) — prior Block specs.json #4 resolved.

All new spec fields present: HoldButtonConfig.holdStyle/vibrateOnRelease/soundOnRelease/blackScreenMode + releaseSensitivity=1.0; DisguisedReminderConfig.randomizeInterval/randomizeTemplateOrder/resetOnEarlyCheckIn/blackScreenMode; LoudAlarmConfig.volume/soundChoice/gradualVolume/flashLight/flashSpeedMs/blackScreenMode; CallEmergencyConfig.showConfirmation=true/sendLocationSmsFirst/confirmationDurationSeconds/blackScreenMode; AppSettings.wrongPinThreshold=5 + sessionLogRetentionDays=180.
PhoneCallContactStrategy now honours ChainStep.retryCount and iterates PhoneCallContactConfig.alternativeContactIds (phone_call_contact_strategy.dart:63,157) — prior Block specs.json #5 resolved.
docs/decisions-log.md now contains D-STRATEGY-2 (line 2842), D-BACKUP-1 (2914), D-TELEMETRY-1 (2926), DRIFT-L8 (1517) — prior Warn specs.json #15 resolved.
open_questions: Layering: move enums.dart from lib/data/models/ to lib/domain/models/ now, or after Phase 4?
EventServices: extend with location/hardwareButton/incomingCall, or promote TriggerManager / SessionController to the documented home for those services in architecture-sketch.md §4.3?
HardwareTrigger: upgrade architecture-sketch.md §4.4 to first-class inventory item or fold into HardwareButtonDistressTrigger fields?
SessionEngine Random default: keep convenience default, or tighten §2.3 by removing the `?? Random()` fallback?
